description: Common Room is a go-to-market platform that unifies first-party customer data and buyer signals into a continuously updated buyer intelligence system. It helps teams identify, prioritize, and act on contacts and accounts using AI-assisted workflows.
summary: Common Room exposes three authenticated HTTP APIs (Core v1, v2, and SCIM) plus an authenticated streamable-HTTP MCP server at https://mcp.commonroom.io/mcp; its site also advertises a CLI, but the public docs scraped here did not reveal install/auth details.
